articles.title: Top Trader Who Nailed 2023 Crypto Rally Names Two Assets To Accumulate Amid Altcoin Beating
articles.description: A trader who skilfully rode the crypto rally earlier this year says he’s keeping an eye on two large-cap altcoins amid the latest sell-off in the digital asset market. articles.title: Venture Capitalist Doubles Down on Solana and Cosmos, Says 2024 Redemption Arc Incoming
articles.description: A crypto investor who accurately called the bottom of the bear market last year is doubling down on some of his calls despite plunging markets. articles.title: Real ‘Altcoin Reckoning’ Hasn’t Even Happened Yet, Says Top Analyst Benjamin Cowen
articles.description: A widely followed analyst says that the real “altcoin reckoning” is still on the horizon despite the latest crypto correction.
